name: All Atom Protein Design
description: Design a new protein using RFdiffusion All Atom and score it for various properties. Design a binder to a ligand, scaffold an existing motif, or diversify your protein to generate variants.
capabilities: Design a new protein using RFdiffusion All Atom and score it for various properties
Design a binder to a ligand, scaffold an existing motif, or diversify your protein to generate variants

pdbFile.description: Input structure containing target protein and/or ligand in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target molecule

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed binder

hotspots.description: Target residues to focus binder design on
